name: FRANKLIN COVEY CO
summary: Franklin Covey Co. is a global organizational performance improvement company. It delivers subscription-based solutions including the All Access Pass (AAP) for enterprises and Leader in Me membership for educational institutions. Core offerings include The 7 Habits of Highly Effective People, The Four Disciplines of Execution, The Speed of Trust, and Multipliers, supported by consulting, coaching, and an AI Coach. The company serves corporations, governments, nonprofits, and educational institutions across approximately 150 countries. Fiscal year 2025 consolidated net revenue totaled $267.1 million.
